meaning: n.[体](由汽船、汽车等牵引在空中滑翔的) 帆伞运动
examples: You can actually go parasailing at Walt Disney World. It's easy to do.
Those looking for more excitement can go parasailing or take a ride on an elephant.
This time, Mr. Anugonda's five-day vacation included an elephant show and parasailing.
If you don't want to see that blowfish blow, look at the world around you with a parasailing adventure.
Scare yourself in myriad ways with the Charleston Chills and Thrills package, including a ghost tour of haunted Charleston, a parasailing adventure 600 feet above the Atlantic, and accommodations.
